article.text: Effective project management is essential for delivering results on time and within budget. A well-managed project starts with a clear scope that defines what needs to be done and, equally important, what should not be done. Project managers break large goals into smaller milestones, each with its own deadline and success criteria. This approach makes it easier to track progress and identify potential delays early. Communication plays a central role in project success. Regular meetings keep team members aligned and provide opportunities to address issues before they escalate. However, too many meetings can reduce productivity, so managers must strike a balance. Risk management is another critical component. Identifying potential risks early allows teams to prepare contingency plans and minimize the impact of unexpected events. Resource allocation, including time, budget, and team capacity, must be carefully planned to avoid burnout and overcommitment. Modern project management tools help teams visualize timelines, assign tasks, and monitor progress in real time. Whether using agile methods with short sprints or traditional waterfall approaches, the key principles remain the same: clear communication, realistic planning, and continuous monitoring.
article.text_cn: 有效的项目管理对于按时、按预算交付成果至关重要。一个管理良好的项目始于明确的范围，定义需要做什么，同样重要的是定义不应该做什么。项目经理将大目标分解为更小的里程碑，每个里程碑都有自己的截止日期和成功标准。这种方法使跟踪进度和及早识别潜在延误变得更加容易。沟通在项目成功中起着核心作用。定期会议保持团队成员步调一致，并提供机会在问题升级之前加以解决。然而，过多的会议会降低生产力，因此管理者必须取得平衡。风险管理是另一个关键组成部分。及早识别潜在风险使团队能够准备应急计划并最大限度地减少意外事件的影响。资源分配，包括时间、预算和团队能力，必须仔细规划，以避免倦怠和过度承诺。现代项目管理工具帮助团队可视化时间线、分配任务并实时监控进度。无论使用敏捷方法的短冲刺还是传统的瀑布方法，核心原则保持不变：清晰的沟通、现实的规划和持续的监控。

model_paragraph.text: Successful project management depends on clear scope definition, effective communication, and proactive risk management. By breaking large goals into milestones and monitoring progress continuously, teams can deliver results on time.
model_paragraph.text_cn: 成功的项目管理依赖于明确的范围定义、有效的沟通和主动的风险管理。通过将大目标分解为里程碑并持续监控进度，团队可以按时交付成果。

collocations: deliver on time and within budget
complete on time and within budget
